name: X8
short_description: X8 is the next generation Hero Shooter, FREE to PLAY (and crossplay) everywhere! Executing its directive to assemble worthy opponents, the rogue mod X8 has collected characters from across different games. Engage in 5v5 VR battles and restore a path back to their worlds!
detailed_description:
The world expands!

5v5 VR Hero Shooter X8 joins forces with Contra, the iconic run-and-gun side scrolling game series, to bring you all the adrenaline of the original game, in VR!

FREE to crossplay on all platforms!

Playing with your friends on Quest or PICO has never been easier – just download the game for FREE and hop into a match!

The Next Generation Hero Shooters

Executing its directive to assemble worthy opponents, the rogue mod X8 has collected characters from across different game franchises. Players embody a variety of heroes and engage in 5v5 VR battles to restore a path back to their worlds.

Force Multiply!

Synergize your gunplay with versatile hero abilities -- activate turrets, tripwires, smokes and more; customize your loadout with an arsenal of weapons and armor to gain the competitive edge.

Master Demolition Mode!

Take turns to Attack and Defend by planting or defusing the Syphon across maps designed to test your creative strategies. Show off your skills and conquer your opponents on the battlefield.

The Arena Is Set. Fighting Is the Only Way Out.

Are You Up to the Challenge?

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
